items: when settlement fails to generate gold it slows down
Added Edge Pan and Bloom settings
Fixed a pathing bug affecting senders
New experience system that replaces Civ Points
Start area is now automatically selected
Only start area is clear of clouds
New Waypost building that is used to clear clouds
Forestlodge placement distances now similar to Woodcamp
Added Raining and Snowing weather states
Re-ordered Buildings list so Woodcamp is first
Added Gold production timer to settlement
